title: Mob Chan's
description: Makes mobs beautiful (and deadly) ladies. With their own special features. 💋
body:
![Mob-Chan's-Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d4e0afbd84293b612438500bdb5ed2f6e139b28.png)


  > «Mob Chan's» — This resource pack will add to Minecraft near-human images of various mobs in the form of attractive (and deadly...) ladies and girls! Also, various mobs have additional variations that can be seen by some random chance. Heh.

![Iris(Witch)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N69F4BHV/images/1b4c957e3ca2cab961b751e910e6b9d95d94fbd4.png)

This resource pack was inspired by an old mod that added the ability to talk to mobs. And some mobs were inspired by various authors who drew art similar to the originals or just to please. And some images for mobs were already invented by me.

<center>


  # Thanks for 12.1K+ download's!

</center>

Sorry, this resource pack will be hidden for the next couple of months.
